description_long: This house features a sprawling, single-story layout with a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in dark shingles. The front facade is symmetrical, with two prominent gabled wings flanking a central covered porch supported by columns and topped with a tan overhang. Large, rectangular windows are evenly spaced across the front, providing ample natural light and a balanced appearance. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, contrasting with the dark roof and porch. The rear of the house includes additional gabled sections and more windows, maintaining the architectural rhythm. The overall design suggests a modern Craftsman or Ranch influence, with practical, inviting features suitable for suburban neighborhoods.
description: A large, single-story house with a multi-gabled dark roof, light exterior walls, and a prominent covered front porch with columns. Symmetrical window placement and Craftsman-inspired details give it a welcoming, suburban feel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central covered porch with columns, and evenly spaced windows on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the complex roof structure, and the extension of the porch roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional gabled sections and windows, with less architectural detailing than the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the multi-layered roof and the side walls, with visible window and wall segmentation.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a prominent overhang
